title: Create: Optimized
description: The smoothest Create experience ever — no clutter, just gears, shafts, and pure engineering bliss.
body:
# ⚙️ Create Optimized

Automation Refined. Performance Perfected.

Create Optimized is a lightweight, performance-focused Minecraft modpack that merges the smooth experience of Optimized FPS
 with the elegant machinery of the Create ecosystem.
This pack strips Minecraft back to its essentials, keeping the core vanilla gameplay intact while enhancing it through mechanical creativity and automation.

## 🧩 The Concept

Where Optimized FPS fine-tunes your framerate, Create Optimized fine-tunes your gameplay.
You won’t find a massive overhaul or dozens of magic and tech mods here—just the clean, polished engineering playground that Create offers, running at silky-smooth performance.

## ⚙️ What’s Inside

- **Create and Friends** – The base Create mod and its best-in-class add-ons (like Create: Steam ‘n’ Rails or Create: Deco) bring motion, logic, and artistry to vanilla worlds.
- **Optimized FPS Foundation** – Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, and other performance libraries ensure minimal lag, even in automation-heavy builds.
- **Seamless Vanilla Integration** – World generation, progression, and balance remain true to vanilla Minecraft—only now, your farms and factories can move.
- **Simplified, Streamlined Design** – No unnecessary clutter. No broken progression. Just you, your machines, and a beautifully stable sandbox to invent in.

## 🌍 Ideal For

- Builders who love redstone-style automation and mechanical motion.
- Players wanting Create’s beauty and complexity without performance loss.
- Servers seeking a lightweight vanilla+ experience that stays stable under load.

## 🧠 Philosophy

Create Optimized is built around one principle: optimization should never sacrifice creativity.
Every mod, every configuration, and every performance tweak serves a purpose—to give you the best possible Create experience while staying as close to vanilla as possible.

## 🚀 Summary

⚙️ A pure, performance-tuned world of gears, shafts, and innovation. Build smarter, run smoother, and let your imagination spin freely.
